positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a majestic, stylized nocturnal creature, such as a glowing owl or a sleek celestial panther, perched on a crescent moon. The scene features geometric celestial bodies, interlocking lunar phases, and swirling cosmic dust patterns rendered in negative space and rich jewel tones (indigo, sapphire, amethyst, emerald). The composition is symmetrical and central, featuring clean, bold silhouettes with high contrast against a deep, textured midnight blue background. The overall aesthetic is retro-modern and mystical, optimized for screen printing or apparel transfer. Art Deco influence with a contemporary graphic edge. Perfect symmetry, ultra-detailed lines, flat color fields, vector art quality.
negative: photorealism, blurry, low contrast, gradients, depth of field, excessive shading, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, complex background, low detail, extra limbs
